title: Update config tests for JSON files
description: Replace env config tests with JSON config tests covering reading, merging, missing files, and validation.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npm test -- tests/config.test.ts runs THEN it verifies global/project reads, missing-file fallback, shallow merge, and project apiKey rejection; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:37
review_initial_requirements: Verify tests assert behavior not implementation details and avoid real secrets.
review_regression_requirements: Run tests/config.test.ts and full npm test.

title: Create init wizard tests
description: Add tests for wizard provider selection, API key redaction, file generation, and optional connectivity checks.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npm test -- tests/init.test.ts runs THEN it covers DeepSeek/OpenAI/Custom flows, masked output, config file writes, declined connectivity, success, and failure; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:38
review_initial_requirements: Verify tests use mock streams and clients, not real network/API keys.
review_regression_requirements: Run tests/init.test.ts and full npm test.

title: Create CLI registration tests
description: Add CLI tests for autob program metadata, init command registration, config show output, and pipeline config injection.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npm test -- tests/cli.test.ts runs THEN it verifies autob name, init/config show commands, redacted config display, and config-driven infer/run wiring; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:39
review_initial_requirements: Verify tests do not depend on user home config and use injected paths/dependencies.
review_regression_requirements: Run tests/cli.test.ts, tests/package-cli.test.ts, and full npm test.

title: Verify existing pipeline tests with JSON config
description: Run the full test suite and build after the new configuration structure is wired through the CLI.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npm run build and npm test run THEN all existing pipeline and package tests pass under the JSON config structure; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-config-redesign.md:40
review_initial_requirements: Verify pipeline tests cover no-config fallback and config-driven LLM path without real credentials.
review_regression_requirements: Run npm run build, npm test, package installed bin smoke, and secret scan.
